message:
fix(codegen): Fix multiple undeclared identifier issues in generated Zig

- Fix function-in-catch-block issue by hoisting fallback function definitions
  from except handlers to module level during Phase 5.1 (before main())
- Only hoist fallback functions when the import will fail; skip when import
  will succeed (module has the function)
- Fix undeclared 'cls' in __new__ and @classmethod decorated methods by
  skipping first param (cls/self) when emitting parameter discards
- Update start_param_idx logic: skip first param for both regular methods
  (self) and classmethods (cls), only start from 0 for staticmethods

Files modified:
- src/codegen/native/main/generator.zig: Add try_stmt handling in Phase 5.1
  to hoist fallback functions from except handlers
- src/codegen/native/statements/try_except.zig: Skip function_def if marked
  in module_level_vars (hoisted or provided by import)
- src/codegen/native/statements/functions/generators/body/function_gen.zig:
  Fix start_param_idx to skip first param for classmethods too
